title: Four Point Five Seconds
summary: The rupture occurs: objective time remains short while Ada experiences dense subjective expansion that cannot be fully reconstructed.

narrative.newInfo: Subjective duration and objective duration diverge at event scale.
narrative.dripHook: The event feels real in impact but remains open in interpretation.
narrative.payoffDelivered: Major payoff reward: Chapter 1 teaser escalates into hard rupture.
narrative.notes: Preserve ambiguity; avoid explanatory labeling during the event.

rewardTokens.description: Reader model shifts from subtle pattern to undeniable rupture.
Objective clock and subjective experience no longer agree.
